mapper.sql: id, order_id, refund_no, payment_id, amount, reason, status, refund_time, third_party_refund_no, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE order_refund SET order_id = #{orderId}, refund_no = #{refundNo}, payment_id = #{paymentId}, amount = #{amount}, reason = #{reason}, status = #{status}, refund_time = #{refundTime}, third_party_refund_no = #{thirdPartyRefundNo}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE order_refund SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
